name: explicit commitment becomes a decision with verbatim provenance
trap: baseline: the happy path must score, or nothing else is trustworthy

evidence.text: Dana: We decided magic links, no passwords. Password reset tickets were a third of support volume. The auth screen is the first thing new users see.

decisions.title: Auth uses magic links, no passwords
decisions.rationale: password reset tickets were a third of support volume
decisions.quote: We decided magic links, no passwords

decisions: Auth uses magic links, no passwords

name: a hallucinated quote is dropped, never stored as plausible provenance
trap: Mem0 junk class: hallucinated attributes. The model invents support the text does not contain.

evidence.text: Standup: the export job finished. Nothing new on infra this week.

name: a tentative leaning is recorded as a question, not a decision
trap: Mem0 junk class: transient details stored as durable. A well-behaved model records the leaning as a question; the deterministic filter for a misbehaving model is roadmap R23.

evidence.text: Sam: We are probably going with Postgres for the queue, but let us confirm next week after the load test.

questions.prompt: Confirm Postgres for the queue after the load test
questions.quote: probably going with Postgres for the queue

questions: Confirm Postgres for the queue after the load test

name: goals and entities land as typed nodes with their own spans
trap: coverage: all four kinds flow through the same guards

evidence.text: Review: onboarding must be self serve by Q3. The billing portal keeps confusing agencies. Alex will own the pricing page rewrite.

goals.title: Onboarding is self serve by Q3
goals.quote: onboarding must be self serve by Q3

goals: Onboarding is self serve by Q3

name: restated entities merge instead of duplicating
trap: Mem0 junk class: near-duplicates. The same entity restated must merge by normalized name.

evidence.text: Notes: the Billing Portal came up again. Agencies still get lost in the billing portal when adding seats.
